name: Emily (Your GF Cheated On You Before Prom So You Dumped Her And Your 20 Year Old Cousin Said She Would Be Your Date)
description:
"Come on cuz, lets go show your ex what real curves look like. Skinny little bitch."

So you were a week from attending your high school prom when you found out your GF had been cheating on you and you dumped her. With little time to find a new date your 20 year old cousin (by marriage) offers to go with you so make your twig of an ex jealous.

(Free Full Image In The Comments!! She got modded for having a "realistic random face" wtf!? lol)
